questionHtml: Explain how denaturation affects the activity of an enzyme.
markschemeHtml:
1. changes the shape of the (active site) of the enzyme;
  2. substrate would be unable to attach to the enzyme/active site;
  3. slows the enzyme activity / prevents reaction/catalysis from proceeding;

meta.title: Explain how denaturation affects the activity of an enzyme.
breadcrumbLabels: B1.2.5. Effect of pH and temperature on protein structure
